title: LongDay
description: 1.5x daytime 0.5x night time. Longer days, shorter nights.
body:
This plugin makes days last 1.5x longer and 0.5x shorten nights. 

Originally in minecraft, day & night time are both 10 minutes. So this plugin makes 15 minutes daytime and 5 minutes night time. 

Tested on 
- 1.7.10
- 1.8.8-1.8.9
- 1.20.6

This plugin should work fine in almost every version including newest ones.
